_meta.artifact_type: Wave 4 Gate-Owner ROLLUP / STATUS ledger — files-only, status-only
_meta.role: Gate Owner — coordination/normalization only. This is a STATUS/ROLLUP artifact. It summarizes already-written QA-passed partitions + addenda. It does NOT merge, does NOT build a new ready file, and does NOT mutate the DB/manifest/310-ready/LEDGER/PROGRESS/ownership_tier/entity_classification/ownership_status.
_meta.scope: Chicagoland / Illinois only. Boston / MA parked (0 MA rows in any Wave-4 partition).
_meta.consolidate_authorization: NOT AUTHORIZED — consolidation remains FROZEN until the user types the explicit consolidation trigger phrase. This rollup neither requests nor performs consolidation.
_meta.interpretation_guardrail: Two distinct accounting units are kept separate throughout: (a) OWNERSHIP-CENSUS readiness = rows at the ready_for_validation ceiling under the new 6-tier reset (none merged; ownership_tier still 0/0 NOT NULL); (b) LEGACY CORPORATE-FLOOR impact = change to the existing entity_classification dso_* count. Do NOT conflate them. The only concrete legacy-floor LIFT from all of Wave 4 to date is +1 (Dentologie).

target.name_db: PRO DENTAL IL - CHAD WISE PC
target.brand: Destiny Dental — Oak Park (1 Chicago Ave, Oak Park, IL 60302)
target.ab7_finding: CONFIRMED OPEN — the Wave-4 Lane-3 'closed_or_relocated' flag is a FALSE POSITIVE, refuted by a fresh transcribed source (the office's own active page with exact address + phone match), the brand locator (Oak Park is a current marketed door), and Yelp 'Updated February 2026 - 39 Reviews'.

network_identity_correction.correction: In the 310, fd93 carries network_id = ao:WILSON-ADELEKE_SIMONE (a SIBLING Destiny/ProSmile friendly-PC network), NOT the literal ao:LABINOV_BORIS member set. Both are friendly-PC wrappers on the same Destiny brand (L2 Management, PE-backed by ProSmile Holdings / TriSpan). Target is LABINOV-related via the shared platform, not by literal AO membership.
network_identity_correction.consequence: No network-release decision touched; target's pe_backed=true / branded_dso tier unchanged.

labinov_member_rows.rationale: All 7 D2 shell addresses have provider_count=0, no website, are absent from the Destiny brand locator, and have NO active patient-facing page — yet NO transcribed closure source exists either.
